summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of MTB suspension tuning website 'Châtel c'est bien rose'. All major functionality works correctly including navigation, interactive features, calculations, and mobile responsiveness. This is a fully static React site with excellent UX and technical accuracy.

design_issues.issue: Pressure values display with double 'psi' suffix (e.g., '92psi psi')
design_issues.details: Minor display formatting issue in pressure calculation results

passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly with sidebar navigation and quick links grid
All 7 navigation links work perfectly (Accueil, Hydraulique fourches, Hydraulique amortisseurs, Types d'amortissement, Clapetteries, Troubleshooting, Calculatrice)
All 3 SVG diagrams present on Hydraulique fourches page (open-bath, compression-flow, rebound-flow)
Force vs Velocity canvas chart renders correctly on Types d'amortissement page
Troubleshooting expandable symptoms work (click to expand/collapse)
Clapetteries interactive shim stack module works - add/remove shims, visual updates, stiffness calculations
All 4 calculator tabs switch properly (SAG, Shim Stack, Diagnostic, Export)
SAG calculations show correct pressure values (fork ~92 psi, shock ~186 psi for 80kg rider with LR 2.8)
Diagnostic module allows symptom selection and shows appropriate diagnostic results
Excel export button is present and functional
Responsive design works on mobile (390px) and tablet (768px) viewports
Mobile navigation works and menu closes after selection
success_percentage: Frontend: 99% - All core functionality working, only minor display formatting issue
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Remove duplicate 'psi' suffix in pressure display formatting in Calculatrice SAG module. Otherwise the site is fully functional and ready for production.
